assumptions: best_followup_allocation index order matches per-state candidate row order
multistep_branch_utility_target is a bounded proxy and not exact forced-k continuation
canonical evaluation labels are from regime_all_pairs and reused as matched truth
caveats: small support in this bounded run (test pair counts by seed: 7, 12, 4)
state-level disagreement diagnostic has very low denominator
results should be treated as directional rather than conclusive
